Sources.Title: Ben Greenfield — WellnessFX results for the 23 April 2014 draw
Ben Greenfield — official Cardiometabolic Report supporting age at collection

TranscriptionNotes: The source reports hs-CRP as below 0.2 mg/L. The stored value is the published assay limit, following the World Cup detection-limit rule; it is not presented as an exact measured concentration.
AgeYears is Ben Greenfield's age at the draw, calculated from the date of birth and collection date shown in his self-published reports and rounded to two decimals.
Albumin was converted from g/dL to g/L by multiplying by 10.
Creatinine was converted from mg/dL to µmol/L by multiplying by 88.4.
Glucose was converted from mg/dL to mmol/L by multiplying by 0.0555.
